home.welcomeSubtitle: A scalable frontend structure designed for resident search, configuration, and user management.
home.arch1: Clean folder separation for pages, stores, services, and composables
home.arch2: Side navigation panel with the main content area
home.arch3: Tailwind utility styling with responsive design
home.arch4: TypeScript support and environment-based API configuration
home.getStartedBody: Use the sidebar to navigate between pages and build the resident search workflow next. The app is ready to expand with backend integration and authentication later.

search.label: Residents
search.title: Search Residents
search.subtitle: Search and browse resident records from the backend service.
search.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, room, or status
search.empty: No residents loaded yet. Click Reload to fetch data.

update.label: Management
update.title: Update Resident
update.subtitle: Update resident details by mobile phone
update.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to update this resident?
update.notFoundBody: No resident found with this mobile phone. Would you like to add a new resident?

validation.firstNameMax: First name must be less than 128 characters
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than 128 characters

userArea.label: Profile
userArea.title: User Area
userArea.subtitle: View and update your profile details.

login.label: Welcome back
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Intelivox account.

changePassword.label: Security
changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Update your account password.
changePassword.firstLoginSubtitle: You must set a new password before continuing.
changePassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

userManagement.label: Administration
userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.subtitle: Create, edit, and manage user accounts and roles.
userManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, email or ID
userManagement.createHint: New users receive a generic password and must change it on first login.
userManagement.genericPasswordNote: A generic password will be assigned automatically.
userManagement.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this user? They will no longer be able to sign in.

settings.label: Preferences
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust application preferences and interface options.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for may have been moved, renamed, or never existed.
errors.forbiddenBody: You don’t have permission to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your administrator.
